steps.title: Solve by factoring
steps.content:
Rearrange and factor:
$$x - a = (x - a)(x - 24)$$
$$x - a - (x - a)(x - 24) = 0$$
$$(x - a)[1 - (x - 24)] = 0$$
$$(x - a)(25 - x) = 0$$
The solutions are $x = a$ and $x = 25$.

steps.title: Determine which statements are solutions
steps.content:
• I. $x = a$ is a solution. ✓
  • II. $x = 24$ is not a solution. Substituting into the original equation: LHS is $24 - a$, RHS is $(24 - a)(0) = 0$. Since $a > 25$, we have $24 - a \neq 0$, so the equation fails. ✗
  • III. $x = 25$ is a solution. ✓
I and III are the solutions — that matches choice B — B is correct.
